effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain FDA approved and MLR locked campaign introduction headline.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline must appear verbatim as: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.'

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love

quotes: "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" → bullets: *Increase your muscle strength* / *Improve your skin symptoms* / *Rely less on steroids* / *Do more of the activities you love*.

"LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" → bullets: *Increase your muscle strength* / *Improve your skin symptoms* / *Rely less on steroids* / *Do more of the activities you love*.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love

quotes: "LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:" → bullets: *Increase your muscle strength* / *Improve your skin symptoms* / *Rely less on steroids* / *Do more of the activities you love*.

rules.intent: Ensure accurate communication of clinical efficacy endpoints allowed under the label.
rules.rule_text: The primary product benefits statement and accompanying bulleted items must strictly adhere to the approved regulatory format detailing muscle strength, skin symptoms, steroid reduction, and activities.

quotes: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease."
...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

rules.intent: Maintain accurate and strictly approved mechanism of action clinical descriptions.
rules.rule_text: MOA messages must utilize one of the two verbatim variants. Primary: 'Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.' Alternating variant: '...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the "on" position.'

quotes: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."
"Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for."

rules.intent: Maintain regulatory clarity regarding administration profile and conversation triggers.
rules.rule_text: Administration description and CTA doctor conversation patterns must be used verbatim. Administration: 'LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.' Doctor-discussion CTA pattern: 'Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.'

quotes: Personalized Communication via PAL — text, phone, email, in person; Authorization Support

rules.intent: Consistent trademark usage for patient support services.
rules.rule_text: The patient support program name must always be formatted verbatim as 'My Compass Support'. It provides personalized communication via PAL (text, phone, email, in person) and Authorization Support.
